notes: EMA trend pullback BUY: above 200 EMA, pulled back below 50 EMA, RSI oversold, ADX confirms.
EMA trend pullback SELL: below 200 EMA, bounced above 50 EMA, RSI overbought, ADX confirms.
London session breakout BUY: price at top of range, high volume, ADX trend.
London session breakout SELL: price at bottom of range, high volume, ADX trend.
NY session breakout BUY: price at top of range, bullish DI, volume confirmation.
NY session breakout SELL: price at bottom of range, bearish DI, volume confirmation.
ADX + PSAR BUY: strong ADX, bullish DI dominates, PSAR bullish, above 50 EMA.
ADX + PSAR SELL: strong ADX, bearish DI dominates, PSAR bearish, below 50 EMA.
Swing high breakout BUY: price near swing high, RSI momentum without overbought, bullish DI.
Swing low breakout SELL: price near swing low, RSI bearish momentum without oversold, bearish DI.
